description_long: This bungalow features a low, horizontal profile with a prominent hip roof and wide eaves, set on a rectangular green lawn. The exterior walls are clad in gray stone or brick, giving it a solid and modern appearance. Large windows are distributed across the facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior, with a notable grouping of windows at the front. A small covered porch is visible at the front entrance, providing a sheltered entryway. The roof is multi-tiered, with intersecting hips creating a visually interesting silhouette. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a hip roof, gray stone exterior, large windows, and a small covered front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and a prominent grouping of windows on the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the hip roof and the extension of the building's side walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows and the building's rectangular footprint.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the hip roof and side windows.
